ms_camera_model.errors package

Submodules

ms_camera_model.errors.errors module

Multispectral Camera Model - Custom Errors

  • Description: Custom error definitions to improve readability and make debugging easier

  • Author: Tomas Vacek

exception ms_camera_model.errors.errors.ImageDataIncompatible[source]

Bases: Exception

Image Data isn’t incompatible

exception ms_camera_model.errors.errors.IncompatibleBandChoice[source]

Bases: Exception

Chosen bands are not compatible with this method

exception ms_camera_model.errors.errors.NoImageData[source]

Bases: Exception

Provided ImageData instance doesn’t contain img_data

exception ms_camera_model.errors.errors.NoProvidedArea[source]

Bases: Exception

No area was provided

exception ms_camera_model.errors.errors.NoProvidedFilepaths[source]

Bases: Exception

No filepaths were provided

Custom error definitions to improve readability and make debugging easier

exception ms_camera_model.errors.ImageDataIncompatible[source]
